name: Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VII
summary: PART I . Overview HVII is a newly organized special purpose acquisition company (a SPAC) incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company with limited liability on September 27, 2024 for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which is referred to throughout this Report as its initial business combination.
